scripts.build: next build && mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && cp -r .next/static .next/server .next/standalone/.next/ && cp -r public .next/standalone/
scripts.build:clean: rm -rf .next && next build && mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && cp -r .next/static .next/server .next/standalone/.next/ && cp -r public .next/standalone/
scripts.start: if [ -f .next/standalone/server.js ]; then HOSTNAME=${HOSTNAME:-0.0.0.0} PORT=${PORT:-3001} node .next/standalone/server.js; else next start; fi
scripts.restart: pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; npm run dev
